This field is a key that links of Part D sponsor's contract and plan identifiers. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PLAN_ID_12 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: 3-digit numeric value 

COMMENT: All Contract and Plan ID that were active in 2012 appear in this data file. To determine whether the
